description_long: This is a tall, slender stone obelisk mounted on a square pedestal base, featuring intricate sculptural ornamentation at the top. The upper section displays a detailed relief or statue, possibly depicting a robed human figure holding a smaller figure, with additional decorative elements surrounding them. The shaft of the obelisk is cylindrical and smooth, contrasting with the ornate top and the robust, blocky base. The base itself is square and appears weathered, with some faint relief work or inscriptions visible on its surface. The overall color palette is a mix of aged gray and stone hues, suggesting weathered stone or concrete construction. The obelisk exudes a classical or historical aesthetic, suitable for placement in parks, plazas, or as a commemorative monument in urban environments.
description: A tall, cylindrical stone obelisk with a square base and ornate sculptural figures at the top, featuring weathered gray tones and classical decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed sculptural group at the top, with the main figure and relief work clearly visible above the cylindrical shaft and square base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the main statue at the top, revealing the depth of the sculptural elements and the smoothness of the shaft.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sculptural top, which is less detailed, and the plain cylindrical shaft with the square base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the statue and the cylindrical shaft, with less visible detail compared to the front.
attribute_ornamentation: Ornate sculptural figures and reliefs at the top, including a robed human figure holding a smaller figure, with additional decorative motifs surrounding them.
attribute_base_design: Square pedestal base with a slightly weathered appearance, featuring faint relief work or possible inscriptions on its faces, constructed from the same stone material as the shaft.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is capped with a rounded finial above the sculptural group, blending into the ornate top section and lacking sharp or pointed features.
